name: EdwLoadMbrAccumRunCycUpd_EE

text.value: WITH cte AS ( SELECT TRGT_SYS_CD, SRC_SYS_CD, SUBJ_CD, MIN(RUN_CYC_NO) AS RUN_CYC_NO, EDW_LOAD_IN FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC WHERE TRGT_SYS_CD='IDS' AND SUBJ_CD='MEMBER_ACCUM' AND EDW_LOAD_IN='N' AND RUN_CYC_NO >= @{pipeline().parameters.IDSRunCycle} GROUP BY TRGT_SYS_CD, SRC_SYS_CD, SUBJ_CD, EDW_LOAD_IN ) UPDATE T SET EDW_LOAD_IN='Y' FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC T JOIN cte C ON T.TRGT_SYS_CD=C.TRGT_SYS_CD AND T.SRC_SYS_CD=C.SRC_SYS_CD AND T.SUBJ_CD=C.SUBJ_CD AND T.RUN_CYC_NO>=C.RUN_CYC_NO WHERE T.EDW_LOAD_IN='N'

Description:
MODIFICATIONS:
Date                 Developer                Change Description
------------------      ----------------------------     --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
2006-04-13      Suzanne Saylor          Original Programming.

2013-07-24       Archana Palivela        Original Programming.

Annotations:
Update the P_RUN_CYC table to indicate source system data has been loaded to the EDW for each of the run cycles processed.
IdsEdwMbrAccumRunCycUpd
Extract P_RUN_CYC records for IDS Member Accump with a value \"N\" in the  EDW_LOAD_IN where the run cycle is >= to the current run cycle used for extracting.
Set EDW_LOAD_IN to 'Y'
